localizations.title: A Memorable Date
localizations.hiddenObject_2: If you examine the notice board closely, you will see a map.
localizations.hint_26_first: The living statue's two swords are broken. You need to retrieve the missing pieces.
localizations.hint_26: The living statue is crossing the swords in a specific way.
localizations.hint_43: Once you have all 4 cables, you'll need to arrange them to form a 2x2 square.
localizations.hint_32: The park entrance is visible, but the sign is backward.
localizations.hint_62_first: The phone's photo gallery contains pictures of the interior of the house you are looking for.
localizations.hint_62: The house you are looking for features a window with four glass panes (one of which is broken), and is adorned with blue curtains. The view outside is unobstructed.
localizations.hint_404_first: "Read" the photographs in the phone's photo gallery, one by one.
localizations.hint_404: As you examine the photos, you can see numbers (or words representing numbers) and mathematical symbols. Now you need to solve the equation.
localizations.hint_48: Once you have all 4 cables, you'll need to arrange them to form a 2x2 square.
localizations.hint_65_first: The phone's photo gallery contains pictures of the interior of the house you are looking for.
localizations.hint_65: The house you are looking for features a window with four glass panes (one of which is broken), and is adorned with blue curtains. The view outside is unobstructed.
localizations.hint_22: Once you have the 4 cables, connect them to each other.
localizations.hint_51: The cheat code book may help you succeed in the Road Trips game.
localizations.hint_16: You have found Camille, but it seems she may have lost her cell phone.
localizations.hint_39: The green smoke has taken on a distinct shape.
localizations.hint_29_first: Images representing the dog's activities can be found in the phone's photo gallery.
localizations.hint_29: If you follow the order of activities during the dog's greeting, you'll find that its owner has taken pictures of the dog performing these same activities.
localizations.hint_76_first: The phone's photo gallery contains pictures of the interior of the house you are looking for.
localizations.hint_76: The house you are looking for features a window with four glass panes (one of which is broken), and is adorned with blue curtains. The view outside is unobstructed.
localizations.hint_99: If you examine the notice board closely, you will see a map.
localizations.hint_202: The green smoke has taken on a distinct shape.
localizations.hint_58: Once you have the 4 cables, connect them to one another.
localizations.hint_64_first: The three conversations you had with people around the park conceal a hidden message. You need to put them together to better understand it.
localizations.hint_64: By combining the three conversations, you should be able to reveal an important message.
localizations.hint_305: The green smoke has taken on a distinct shape.
localizations.hint_72_first: The phone's photo gallery contains pictures of the interior of the house you are looking for.
localizations.hint_72: The house you are looking for features a window with four glass panes (one of which is broken), and is adorned with blue curtains. The view outside is unobstructed.
localizations.hint_44: Richard may be able to help you once he's had something to eat.
localizations.hint_28: You shouldn't feed the dog chocolate. However, the bone from the trash should do the trick.
localizations.hint_59_first: The phone's photo gallery contains pictures of the interior of the house you are looking for.
localizations.hint_59: The house you are looking for features a window with four glass panes (one of which is broken), and is adorned with blue curtains. The view outside is unobstructed.
localizations.hint_101: You don't see anything edible in the trash can, but you do see a bone sticking out the back side.
localizations.hint_8_first: The green smoke has taken on a distinct shape, and you also see a strange gear emerge from the phone.
localizations.hint_8: Both the numbers and the gear are green.
localizations.hint_71: The intercom is malfunctioning. Look around to find a way to use it to enter the library.
localizations.hint_12: The mainframe's password is not exactly hidden, as it's written all over the place. What you need to find is the owner's username, which will be the alias of the Road Trips champion.
localizations.hint_machine_66_part1: The phone is too hot to handle right now. You need to find a way to cool it down.
localizations.hint_machine_66_part2_first: The back of the phone case (73) and the lock screen both feature identical looking stars.
localizations.hint_machine_66_part2: Only one of the constellations on the phone case (73) can be reproduced using the dots on the screen. Make sure to look closely at the star next to each diagram, to help you orient the pattern properly.
localizations.hint_machine_roadtripes: Playing fair won't get you anywhere. You can either ask Richard for help or cheat.
localizations.hint_machine_crottepassion_first: The app seems to keep track of a lot of poops. You need to find a certain kind that you may have seen somewhere else. But where?
localizations.hint_machine_crottepassion: After identifying the poop belonging to the phone owner's dog, you'll need to use the city map pinned to the notice board (99) to locate the correct street, then take a cab to get there.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part1: If the blue light is on, follow the instructions found on (F).
localizations.hint_machine_85_part2:
The new instructions (G) contain diagrams indicating the following actions:

- If a "1" is displayed, you will need to activate an element associated with a hexagon.
- If a "2" is displayed, you will need to activate an element associated with the color pink.
- If a "3" is displayed, you will need to activate an element associated with the color gray.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part3: If all the lights are on, you must ignore the other instructions.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part4:
The new instructions (P) provide a flowchart that leads to the following instructions:

- If "maybe" appears, you can activate any element this is not already activated.
- If "no" appears, activate an element associated with an octagon.
- If "yes" appears, activate an element associated with a triangle.
localizations.hint_machine_85_part6: Instruction (J) encourages caution, but it does not tell you to avoid pressing the red button.
localizations.hint_89: After sucking Camille in, a strange shaped cloud was left behind in the air.
localizations.hint_20: A Bluetooth option has popped up on the screen.
localizations.answer_hint_26: Take the cards featuring the broken sword pieces (47 and 55), and overlap them near their broken ends. Place sword 47 on top of sword 55, aligning them to match the angle of the broken swords held by the living statue on card 26. By doing this, you will see the number 64 on the blades.
localizations.answer_hint_43: Assemble the following cards: 22, 43, 48, and 58. Place card 22 to the right of card 43. Position card 58 below card 43, rotated 180°. Finally, place card 48 beneath card 22, also rotated 180°. With this arrangement, the cables will form the number 20.
localizations.answer_hint_32: The sign visible at the entrance to the park is backward, and looks like the number 18 from this angle. When viewed from the front, however, the digits would be reversed, resulting in the number 81.
localizations.answer_hint_62: The only house with a window featuring four panes (one of which is broken), blue curtains, offering a clear view with no obstructions, and free of signs indicating construction or pet restrictions is the house at 90 B.
localizations.answer_hint_404:
When you examine the photos in each row, from top-to-bottom and left-to-right, you will notice "230" in the photo 1, "+" in photo 6, "100" in photos 7 and 8 combined, "+" in photo 9, "2" in photo 12, "-" in photo 13, "300" in photo 14 (Mr. "Thrieundred").
Use these to calculate the final result: 230 + 100 + 2 - 300 = 32
localizations.answer_hint_65: The only house with a window featuring four panes (one of which is broken), blue curtains, offering a clear view with no obstructions, and free of signs indicating construction or pet restrictions is the house at 90 B.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Open the cheat code book (51) and turn to the Road Trips page by using the +18 found on the Road Trips app. 51 + 18 = 69.
localizations.answer_hint_16:
Give the phone you found (73) to Camille (16).
73 + 16 =89
localizations.answer_hint_39: The smoke forms the letter A.
localizations.answer_hint_29: Using the phone's photo gallery, find each photo representing each of the dog's actions, and trace lines between them in order; doing this will form the number 17.
localizations.answer_hint_76: The only house with a window featuring four panes (one of which is broken), blue curtains, offering a clear view with no obstructions, and free of signs indicating construction or pet restrictions is the house at 90 B.
localizations.answer_hint_99:
The note saying "To enter, ring the bell 3 times in a row" is telling you what to do with the intercom (71) - press the button 3 times in a row.
Additionally, the map is partially obscured, forming the number 6.
localizations.answer_hint_202: The smoke forms the letter C.
localizations.answer_hint_64: Combine cards 64, 21, and 82 to create a new, complete dialog, which instructs you to open the store on the phone and search for the Poop Puppy Doo app.
localizations.answer_hint_305: The red flame and green smoke combine to form the number 8.
localizations.answer_hint_72: The only house with a window featuring four panes (one of which is broken), blue curtains, offering a clear view with no obstructions, and free of signs indicating construction or pet restrictions is the house at 90 B.
localizations.answer_hint_28: Take the bone (+8) sticking out from the other side of the trash can (O) and give it to the dog (28). 28 + 8 = 36.
localizations.answer_hint_59: The only house with a window featuring four panes (one of which is broken), blue curtains, offering a clear view with no obstructions, and free of signs indicating construction or pet restrictions is the house at 90 B.
localizations.answer_hint_101: Take the bone (+8) sticking out from the other side of the trash can (O) and give it to the dog (28). 28 + 8 = 36.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Assemble the conversation between McConey (you) and Richard (39, A, C, and 8). The green smoke and flames will form the number 85, along with a green gear next to it. Access Machine 85.
localizations.answer_hint_71: Press the intercom button three times, as indicated on the notice board (99).
localizations.answer_hint_12: By winning the Road Trips game, you discover that the champion's alias is "Turbochad". You can use this along with the password "1234", which is posted everywhere around the computer.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_66_part1: Blow on the device to cool it down.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_66_part2: The back of the phone case (73) and the phone's lock screen feature identical stars. The only constellation on the back of the phone case that can be reproduced using the nine dots on the lock screen is the one near the center of the case. Reproduce this pattern, making sure you are aligning the constellation so the star is on the bottom (just like on the screen).
localizations.answer_hint_machine_roadtripes: Access the cheat code book (51) that Richard (44) gave you, and turn to the "Road Trips" page using the red +18 found on the Road Trips app itself. 51 + 18 = 69.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_crottepassion: By following the trail of poops that are identical to the one found in the phone's photo gallery, you can locate the street where the cell phone's owner resides. The name of the street is not on the app, but can be found marked on the city map (6) pinned to the notice board (99). Open your Taxi app and head to Dodge St.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part1: According to the instructions on (F), you must press the switch with the yellow symbol when the blue light is on.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part2: According to the instructions on (F) and (G), adjust the first slider to align with the circle, and the third slider to align with the hexagon.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part3: According to the instructions on (F) and (G), you must plug one cable into the socket with a pentagon, and another to the socket marked with gray.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part4: According to the instructions on (F), (G), and (P), you must press the switches featuring the yellow and pink colors, as well as the one next to the octagon.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part5: According to the instructions on (F), (G), (P), and (T), you must connect the cable to a socket with a hexagon, adjust the first slider to align with the triangle, and the second slider to align with the blue color.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_85_part6: Instruction (J) encourages caution, but it does not tell you to avoid pressing the red button. Press the red button.
localizations.answer_hint_89: The smoke left behind when Camille was sucked into the phone is in the shape of the number 66.
localizations.answer_hint_20: A Bluetooth symbol has appeared in the upper-left corner of the phone. Tap on it and pair the phone with the mainframe; you'll need to pair the phone with a new device.
localizations.machine_71: The door opens with a crackling electronic sound.
localizations.machine_66: You unlock the phone, causing it to make a loud beeping noise in response. Annoyed, the librarian asks you to leave the library immediately.
localizations.machine_lapinot_bluetooth: The cellphone is now connected to the mainframe via Bluetooth.
localizations.machine_12: You have logged into the computer.
localizations.machine_85_step_1: The cellphone screen changes to reveal a control panel, as the mainframe begins to print an instruction document.
localizations.machine_85_step_2: The panel shifts and the mainframe continues to print additional documents.
localizations.machine_85_step_3: The panel shifts again, and the mainframe prints out yet another document.
localizations.machine_85_step_4: The panel shifts once more, and the mainframe prints out more instructions.
localizations.machine_85_step_5: As the panel changes for the fifth time, the mainframe prints out one final document.
localizations.machine_66_locked: The cellphone has cooled down, but it remains locked.
localizations.library_noise: You must remain quiet while inside the library.
localizations.game_gameover: You ran into a wall; how unfortunate. You'll need to do better to see the high score list.
localizations.game_gameover_2: You won't succeed at this rate. You'll need to find some outside help.
localizations.machine_85: A portal opens up and pulls you and Richard into the Vialabris. You soon find yourself in an unfamiliar world. However, all is well, as you find Camille. She greets you warmly and asks "So, how do we get out of here?"
localizations.machine_store_instructions: Which app do you wish to download?
localizations.machine_taxi_instructions: Where do you wish to go?
localizations.machine_taxi: The taxi takes you to the street you requested. However, you still need to find the right house.
